---
name: Publish Failure
about: Publishing a release failed, timed out, or produced uncertain results
title: "[Publish] "
labels: publish, bug
---

## What happened during publish

<!-- Did it fail with an error? Time out? Show uncertain status? -->

## Did the app show a timeout or error message?

<!-- Copy the exact message if possible -->

## Did you try "Check Status" or retry?

- [ ] Yes, Check Status found a valid receipt
- [ ] Yes, Check Status found no receipt
- [ ] Yes, I retried and it worked
- [ ] Yes, I retried and it failed again
- [ ] No

## Were you using Studio Mode or Advanced Mode?

- [ ] Studio Mode (Publish step)
- [ ] Advanced Mode (Mint panel)

## Wallet file

<!-- Do NOT attach your wallet file. Just confirm: did the wallet file load successfully before the publish attempt? -->

- [ ] Yes, wallet loaded fine
- [ ] No, wallet loading also had issues
- [ ] Not sure

## Support bundle

Please export a support bundle (click "Report" in the title bar) and attach it. This is especially important for publish issues because the action log shows exactly what the app attempted.
